general_info.definition: Carbon nanoparticles for the detection of dopamine based on the fluorescent enhancement

method.conditions: Hot alkali solution(sodium hydroxide) for 5 min

structural.crystallinity: lattice fringes with interplanar distance around 0.20nm. Disordered structure in crystalline of the sp2 cluster and the plane graphite sp3

applications.performance: Linear range 1.0-10.0 µM; Lower Detection limit 0.22 µM
applications.comparative_advantage: Fast response, is inexpensive and highly selective.)
